name: Marinated Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces feta cheese; cut into 8 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, pour the olive oil.
2. Add the chicken breasts and coat them well with the oil.
3. Spread the garlic on both sides of each chicken breast.
4. Sprinkle the lemon juice over the chicken.
5. Sprinkle oregano and white pepper over the chicken.
6. Cover the pan and place it in the refrigerator. Marinate the chicken for 24 hours.
7. Charbroil the chicken for 5 to 6 minutes on each side, or until it is done.
8. Brush the chicken with the marinade throughout cooking.
9. Place the broiled chicken on a large serving platter.
10. Put a piece of feta cheese on top of each chicken breast.
